name: envoy-base-utils

metadata.name: envoy.base.utils
metadata.summary: "A collection of utils used in Envoy proxy's CI"

documentation:
envoy.base.utils
================

Base utilities for Envoy proxy's CI

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.abstract.protobuf.AProtobufValidator.validate_fragment
documentation:
Validate a dictionary representing a JSON/YAML fragment against an
Envoy API proto3 type.

Throws Protobuf errors on parsing exceptions, successful
validations produce no result.

modules.name: envoy.base.utils.utils
documentation: Provides shared utils used by other python modules

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.utils.coverage_with_data_file
documentation:
This context manager takes the path of a data file and creates a custom
coveragerc with the data file path included.

The context is yielded the path to the custom rc file.
this is testing specific - consider moving to tools.testing.utils

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.utils.from_json
documentation: Returns the loaded python object from a JSON file given by `path`

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.utils.from_yaml
documentation: Returns the loaded python object from a yaml file given by `path`

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.utils.to_yaml
documentation:
For given `data` dumps as yaml to provided `path`.

Returns `path`

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.utils.ellipsize
documentation:
Truncate strings to a given length with an ellipsis suffix where
required.

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.utils.typed
documentation:
Attempts to cast a value to a given type, TypeVar, or TypeDict.

raises TypeError if cast value is `None`

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.utils.async_list
documentation:
Turn an async generator into a here and now list, with optional
filter.

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.utils.cd_and_return
documentation:
Changes working directory to given path and returns to previous working
directory on exit.

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.utils.last_n_bytes_of
documentation: Return the last `n` bytes from a file, defaults to 1 byte.

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.utils.tuple_pair
documentation: This allows dict generators to split items and pass type checking.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.abstract.project.project.AProject.directory
documentation:
Greppable directory - optionally in a git repo, depending on whether
we want to look at all files.

modules.name: envoy.base.utils.tar
documentation: - use asyncio and move to aio.core
- remove zst when https://bugs.python.org/issue37095 is resolved

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.tar.is_tarlike
documentation:
Returns a bool based on whether a file looks like a tar file depending
on its file extension.

This allows for a provided path to save to, to dynamically be either
considered a directory (to create) or a tar file (to create).

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.tar.untar
documentation:
Untar a tarball into a temporary directory.

for example to list the contents of a tarball:

```
import os

from tooling.base.utils import untar


with untar("path/to.tar") as tmpdir:
    print(os.listdir(tmpdir))

```

the created temp directory will be cleaned up on
exiting the contextmanager

functions.name: envoy.base.utils.tar._open
documentation:
For a given tarball path if it contains `:` split prefix, path,
otherwise prefix is empty.

If the tarfile is `tar.zst` use zstd to decompress.

Return prefix, and opened tarfile for path.

classes.name: envoy.base.utils.yaml.IgnoredKey
documentation: Python support type for Envoy's config !ignore tag.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IInventories.versions_path
documentation: Path to the inventory versions file.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IInventories.changes_for_commit
documentation: Changes to add/commit for a given change dictionary.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IChangelogEntry.change
documentation: Description of the change for this entry.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IChangelogs.changelog_paths
documentation: Mapping of changelog versions to changelog file paths.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IChangelogs.changelogs
documentation: Ordered mapping of changelog versions to changelog objects.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IChangelogs.current
documentation: The current (most recent or active) changelog.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IChangelogs.is_pending
documentation:
Flag indicating whether the current changelog is set to
`Pending`.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IChangelogs.changes_for_commit
documentation: Changes to add/commit for a given change dictionary.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IChangelogs.write_current
documentation: Create the `current.yaml` changelog file from a template.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IChangelogs.write_date
documentation: Set the date in the `current.yaml` changelog file.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IChangelogs.write_version
documentation: Write the `current.yaml` file to the current version.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IProject.dev_version
documentation: Returns the current version iff its a dev version.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IProject.is_dev
documentation: Flag indicating whether the project is in "dev" mode.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IProject.is_main_dev
documentation:
If the patch version is `0` and its a dev branch then we are on
`main`

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IProject.minor_version
documentation: Minor version for the current version.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IProject.rel_version_path
documentation: Path to the project version file.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IProject.session
documentation: HTTP client session used for retrieving project data.

methods.name: envoy.base.utils.interface.IProject.is_current
documentation: Check if a version is the current one.
